action_fields.raw_semantics: commanded relative Cartesian end-effector translation + commanded relative RPY/yaw rotation + sparse gripper command

observation_7d.semantics: [absolute_eef_x, absolute_eef_y, absolute_eef_z, absolute_roll_rad, absolute_pitch_rad, absolute_yaw_rad, gripper_closed]
observation_7d.notes: base_pose_tool_reached is absolute end-effector pose in the robot base frame. RPY is derived from quaternion xyzw and should be kept in radians.

action_7d.semantics: [commanded_delta_x, commanded_delta_y, commanded_delta_z, commanded_delta_roll_rad, commanded_delta_pitch_rad, commanded_delta_yaw_rad, gripper_target]
action_7d.notes: Kuka raw gripper action is sparse: +1 closes, -1 opens, 0 holds. The adapter converts it to binary target 0=open, 1=closed.

gripper_action_vs_next_closed_delta.interpretation: Raw gripper action is a sparse transition command. +1 is followed by closed rising, -1 is followed by closed falling, and 0 holds state.

rotation_delta.interpretation: Only yaw action is nonzero in the checked shard. Rotation values are radians/command units, not degrees.

problems_found: Not all episodes are success, refer to metadata.
Raw gripper action is sparse command format, not direct binary target; adapter converts to 0=open, 1=closed target with hold behavior.
rotation_delta roll/pitch are zero in checked shard; yaw is the active rotation command.

action_normalization.method: clip each standardized action dimension to q01/q99, then linearly map to [-1, 1]

source.note: Stats are computed from locally available shards only; rerun this script after downloading a larger subset.
